data.name: TransactionNotFound
data.value: Transaction not found.

data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: AllTokensRevokedSuccess
data.value: All tokens revoked successfully.

data.name: CurrentPasswordIncorrect
data.value: Current password is incorrect.

data.name: EmailClaimNotFound
data.value: Email claim not found in the JWT token.

data.name: ForgotPasswordSent
data.value: If that email is registered, you will receive a reset code shortly.

data.name: GoogleAuthNotConfigured
data.value: Google authentication is not configured.

data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: InvalidOtp
data.value: Invalid, expired, or already used OTP code.

data.name: InvalidRefreshToken
data.value: Invalid or expired refresh token.

data.name: OtpVerifiedSuccess
data.value: OTP verified successfully.

data.name: PasswordUpdatedSuccess
data.value: Password updated successfully.

data.name: RefreshTokenNotFound
data.value: Refresh token not found or already revoked.

data.name: TokenRevokedSuccess
data.value: Token revoked successfully.

data.name: UnauthorizedJwt
data.value: Unauthorized. A valid JWT token is required.

data.name: AdminIsolation
data.value: Global administrators can only manage users. They do not have access to project data, categories, expenses, or obligations.

data.name: UserActivatedSuccess
data.value: User activated successfully.

data.name: UserDeactivatedSuccess
data.value: User deactivated successfully.

data.name: UserAlreadyExists
data.value: A user with this email already exists.

data.name: UserEmailNotFound
data.value: User with the specified email not found.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: UserNotFoundOrDeleted
data.value: User not found or deleted.

data.name: UserAlreadyDeleted
data.value: User is already deleted.

data.name: AccountDeactivated
data.value: Your account is deactivated. You can only perform read operations.

data.name: ForbiddenAccess
data.value: You do not have permission to access this resource.

data.name: ForbiddenResource
data.value: Forbidden. You don't have permission to access this resource.

data.name: TooManyRequests
data.value: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.

data.name: AmountMustBePositive
data.value: Amount must be greater than zero.

data.name: CannotMixSplitTypes
data.value: Cannot mix 'percentage' and 'fixed' split types in the same transaction.

data.name: DateRequired
data.value: Date is required.

data.name: FixedSplitsMustSumTotal
data.value: Fixed amount splits must sum to the total original amount.

data.name: InvalidAmount
data.value: The specified amount is invalid.

data.name: InvalidDateRange
data.value: Invalid date range: 'from' cannot be greater than 'to'.

data.name: InvalidMonth
data.value: month must use YYYY-MM format

data.name: PercentageSplitsMustSum100
data.value: Percentage splits must sum to 100.

data.name: TitleRequired
data.value: Title is required.

data.name: TransactionReferenceExists
data.value: A transaction with the same internal reference already exists.

data.name: TransactionReferenceExistsDeleted
data.value: A deleted transaction with the same internal reference already exists.

data.name: CannotChangeBaseProject
data.value: Cannot change the base project of a paid project.

data.name: ProjectAccessDenied
data.value: You do not have access to this project.

data.name: ProjectIdRequired
data.value: project_id query parameter is required.

data.name: ProjectNotFound
data.value: Project not found.

data.name: ProjectPartnersDisabledHasSplits
data.value: Cannot disable partner splits: the project has transactions with splits. Remove all split transactions before disabling this feature.

data.name: ProjectPartnersEnabledRequiresMinPartners
data.value: Cannot enable partner splits: the project needs at least 2 active partners.

data.name: SubprojectsNotEnabled
data.value: The project does not have paid subprojects enabled.

data.name: WorkspaceAccessDenied
data.value: You do not have access to this workspace.

data.name: WorkspaceCannotDeleteActiveProjects
data.value: Cannot delete a workspace that has active projects.

data.name: WorkspaceNotFound
data.value: Workspace not found.

data.name: InvalidRole
data.value: Invalid role. Allowed: editor, viewer.

data.name: MemberAlreadyExists
data.value: The user is already a member of this project.

data.name: MemberCannotChangeOwnerRole
data.value: Cannot change the role of the project owner.

data.name: MemberCannotRemoveOwner
data.value: Cannot remove the project owner.

data.name: MemberNotFound
data.value: Project member not found.

data.name: CategoryCannotDeleteDefault
data.value: Cannot delete the default 'General' category. You can rename it or create other categories.

data.name: CategoryHasActiveTransactions
data.value: Cannot delete the category because it has active related incomes or expenses.

data.name: CategoryNotFound
data.value: Category not found in this project.

data.name: ExpenseNotFound
data.value: Expense not found in this project.

data.name: ExpenseNotTemplate
data.value: The specified expense is not a template.

data.name: TemplateNotFound
data.value: Template not found in this project.

data.name: IncomeNotFound
data.value: Income not found in this project.

data.name: EquivalentAmountRequiredForCrossCurrency
data.value: The equivalent amount in the obligation currency is required for this payment.

data.name: InsufficientFunds
data.value: Insufficient funds to complete the operation.

data.name: ObligationAlreadyDeleted
data.value: This obligation has already been deleted.

data.name: ObligationAlreadyPaid
data.value: This obligation is already fully paid. No additional payments are allowed.

data.name: ObligationHasActiveExpenses
data.value: Cannot delete the obligation because it has active expense payments linked to it.

data.name: ObligationNotFound
data.value: Obligation not found in this project.

data.name: ObligationProjectMismatch
data.value: The obligation does not belong to the same project as the expense.

data.name: PaymentExceedsObligationTotal
data.value: The payment would exceed the total obligation amount.

data.name: PaymentSuccess
data.value: Payment processed successfully.

data.name: BudgetAlreadyExists
data.value: An active budget already exists for this project. Update or delete the existing one first.

data.name: BudgetNotFound
data.value: No active budget found for this project.

data.name: DuplicatePartnerInSplits
data.value: A duplicate partner was found in the splits.

data.name: PartnerAlreadyAssignedToProject
data.value: This partner is already assigned to the project.

data.name: PartnerHasActivePaymentMethodsInProjects
data.value: Cannot delete a partner whose payment methods are linked to active projects.

data.name: PartnerHasPaymentMethods
data.value: Cannot delete a partner that still has active payment methods. Delete them first.

data.name: PartnerHasProjects
data.value: Cannot delete a partner that is still assigned to one or more projects. Remove them from those projects first.

data.name: PartnerHasLinkedPaymentMethods
data.value: Cannot remove the partner from the project while it has linked payment methods. Unlink those payment methods first.

data.name: PartnerHasSettlements
data.value: Cannot remove the partner from the project while it has registered settlements.

data.name: PartnerHasSplits
data.value: Cannot remove the partner from the project while it has registered expense or income splits.

data.name: PartnerNotAssignedToProject
data.value: The partner is not assigned to this project.

data.name: PartnerNotFound
data.value: Partner not found.

data.name: PartnerNotOwnedByUser
data.value: You can only assign your own partners to projects.

data.name: PartnersMustBeDifferent
data.value: From and To partners must be different.

data.name: PartnersNotEnabled
data.value: Partners are not enabled for this project.

data.name: SettlementNotFound
data.value: Settlement not found in this project.

data.name: AccountAmountRequiredForDistinctCurrencies
data.value: Account amount is required when the payment method currency differs from both the original and project currencies.

data.name: PaymentMethodAlreadyLinked
data.value: The payment method is already linked to this partner.

data.name: PaymentMethodAlreadyLinkedToProject
data.value: This payment method is already linked to the project.

data.name: PaymentMethodCannotUnlinkPartner
data.value: Cannot unlink partner: this payment method is linked to one or more projects. Remove it from all projects first.

data.name: PaymentMethodHasActiveTransactions
data.value: Cannot delete the payment method because it has active related incomes or expenses.

data.name: PaymentMethodNoPartnerLinked
data.value: The payment method does not have a linked partner.

data.name: PaymentMethodNotFound
data.value: Payment method not found.

data.name: PaymentMethodNotLinkedToProject
data.value: Payment method is not linked to the specified project.

data.name: ProjectPaymentMethodHasActiveTransactions
data.value: Cannot unlink the payment method from the project because it has active related incomes or expenses in this project.

data.name: AlternativeCurrencyAlreadyExists
data.value: This currency is already configured as an alternative for this project.

data.name: AlternativeCurrencyCannotBeBaseCurrency
data.value: Cannot add the project's base currency as an alternative currency.

data.name: AlternativeCurrencyHasActiveTransactions
data.value: Cannot delete the alternative currency because there are active incomes or expenses using it in this project.

data.name: AlternativeCurrencyNotFound
data.value: Alternative currency not found for this project.

data.name: CurrencyNotActive
data.value: The specified currency is not active.

data.name: CurrencyNotFound
data.value: Currency not found.

data.name: ExchangeRateMustBePositive
data.value: ExchangeRate must be greater than zero.

data.name: ExchangeRateNotAvailable
data.value: Exchange rate is not available for the requested currency pair.

data.name: ExchangeRateParamsRequired
data.value: Both 'from' and 'to' query parameters are required.

data.name: ExchangeRateServiceDisabled
data.value: The exchange rate API is disabled by configuration.

data.name: ExchangeRateServiceMissingApiKey
data.value: Exchange rate API key is not configured.

data.name: ExchangeRateServiceUnavailable
data.value: Exchange rate service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or enter the rate manually.

data.name: InvalidCurrencyCode
data.value: The original currency must be a valid 3-letter ISO code.

data.name: InvalidPlanPrice
data.value: The plan has an invalid monthly price.

data.name: NoActivePlansForSync
data.value: No active plans found for Stripe synchronization.

data.name: NoDefaultPlanAvailable
data.value: No active plans found. Initialize the database with at least one plan.

data.name: PlanIsFree
data.value: The plan is free and does not require checkout.

data.name: PlanMissingStripePriceId
data.value: The plan does not have a Stripe Price ID. Run sync-plans first.

data.name: PlanNotActive
data.value: The plan is not active.

data.name: PlanNotFound
data.value: Plan not found.

data.name: PlanNotFoundOrInactive
data.value: The user's plan was not found or is inactive.

data.name: StripeDisabled
data.value: Stripe billing is disabled by configuration.

data.name: StripeMissingSecretKey
data.value: Stripe secret key is missing. Configure Stripe:SecretKey.

data.name: StripeMissingWebhookSecret
data.value: Stripe webhook secret is missing. Configure Stripe:WebhookSecret.

data.name: PlanDenied
data.value: Your current plan '{0}' does not include the feature '{1}'. Please upgrade your plan.

data.name: PlanLimitExceeded
data.value: You have reached the limit for '{0}' on your current plan. Please upgrade your plan.

data.name: SubscriptionAlreadyActive
data.value: User already has an active subscription. Use change-plan instead of creating a second subscription.

data.name: SubscriptionAlreadyCanceled
data.value: The current subscription is already canceled.

data.name: SubscriptionAlreadyOnPlan
data.value: The subscription is already on the requested plan.

data.name: SubscriptionCanceledButNotLoaded
data.value: The subscription was canceled in Stripe but could not be loaded locally.

data.name: SubscriptionCannotBeManagedAutomatically
data.value: The subscription is in a status that cannot be managed automatically.

data.name: SubscriptionMissingBillableItem
data.value: The Stripe subscription does not have a billable item to update.

data.name: SubscriptionNotFound
data.value: No subscription found for current user.

data.name: SubscriptionUpdatedButNotLoaded
data.value: The subscription was updated in Stripe but could not be loaded locally.

data.name: DocumentIntelligenceDisabled
data.value: Azure Document Intelligence is disabled by configuration.

data.name: DocumentIntelligenceMissingApiKey
data.value: Azure Document Intelligence API key is missing.

data.name: DocumentIntelligenceMissingEndpoint
data.value: Azure Document Intelligence endpoint is missing.

data.name: DocumentIntelligenceNoAnalyzeResult
data.value: Azure Document Intelligence did not return an analyze result.

data.name: DocumentIntelligenceNoDocumentFields
data.value: No document fields were found in the analysis result.

data.name: DocumentIntelligenceNoOperationLocation
data.value: Azure Document Intelligence did not return a valid operation location.

data.name: DocumentIntelligencePollFailed
data.value: The Azure Document Intelligence polling request failed.

data.name: DocumentIntelligenceTimeout
data.value: Azure Document Intelligence timed out while processing the document.

data.name: FileRequired
data.value: A non-empty file is required.

data.name: FileTooLarge
data.value: The file is too large. Maximum allowed size is {0} MB.

data.name: UnsupportedContentType
data.value: Unsupported content type. Allowed: PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, TIFF, HEIF.

data.name: ChatbotAllProvidersUnavailable
data.value: All chatbot providers are currently unavailable.

data.name: ChatbotNoProvidersEnabled
data.value: No chatbot providers are enabled. Configure at least one API key.

data.name: ChatbotProviderEmptyBody
data.value: The AI provider returned an empty response body.

data.name: ChatbotProviderEmptyMessage
data.value: The AI provider returned an empty message.
